Weight.name: Weight/Speed
Weight.description: The 'weight' (or speed) of the smoothness. Higher = faster, Lower = Slower

Stretch.description: Whether or not to do a cool stretch thingy.

custom-colour.name: Custom Caret Colour
custom-colour.description: Use a custom colour for the caret!

col-type.name: Colour Type
col-type.description: Type of <cr>custom colour!</c>. Static is for the colour to <cb>stay the same</c>, and chroma is to <c-ff0000>g</c><c-ff4100>a</c><c-ff8200>y</c><c-feb500>i</c><c-fdda00>f</c><c-fbff00>y</c><c-97ff22> </c><c-32ff44>t</c><c-00e077>h</c><c-00a1bb>e</c><c-0062ff> </c><c-243bff>c</c><c-4714ff>a</c><c-7a00fd>r</c><c-bd00fa>e</c><c-ff00f7>t</c>

col.name: Static Colour
col.description: The custom caret colour! Only works if the <cb>'Colour Type'</c> is set to <co>'Static Colour'</c>

chroma-speed.description: How fast it changes colours. Higher is faster, lower is slower.
